files.message_content:
from Nusko:
> Hi all, I just launched an app called DailyBite, it creates a personalized mental health plan that you follow day by day, small 5-10 min tasks based on real therapy techniques. Good for anxiety, stress, doom-scrolling addiction, that kind of thing a lot of us deal with but don't really talk about. 
> 
> I collaborated with 2 licensed psychologists to make sure the plans are actually grounded, and it's 100% free during beta. 
> 
> If anyone wants to try it and drop some feedback, I'd really appreciate it 🙏 
> iOS → https://apps.apple.com/ca/app/dailybite/id6760317666 
> Android → https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=ca.dailybite.app&hl=en_CA

from Nusko:
> Hi all, I just launched an app called DailyBite, it creates a personalized mental health plan that you follow day by day, small 5-10 min tasks based on real therapy techniques. Good for anxiety, stress, doom-scrolling addiction, that kind of thing a lot of us deal with but don't really talk about. 
> 
> I collaborated with 2 licensed psychologists to make sure the plans are actually grounded, and it's 100% free during beta. 
> 
> If anyone wants to try it and drop some feedback, I'd really appreciate it 🙏 
> iOS → https://apps.apple.com/ca/app/dailybite/id6760317666 
> Android → https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=ca.dailybite.app&hl=en_CA

Hey devs 👋

Every "autonomous agent" demo breaks the moment it hits a paywall — today the only options are (1) hardcode an API key (compromised = infinite spend) or (2) share your credit card.

Shipping LemonCake to fix that: spend-capped, time-boxed, revocable Pay Tokens for agents. Open source, MIT. For ElizaOS v2, one line:

```ts
import { lemoncakePlugin } from "eliza-plugin-lemoncake";

export const character = {
  name:    "MyAgent",
  plugins: [lemoncakePlugin],   // drop in — that's it
};
```
Message your agent "pay 0.10 USDC to call jina-reader and read this URL" → plugin mints a spend-capped JWT, calls the service, returns the receipt. Hits cap → auto-stops. Token leaks → one call revokes atomically.

✅ Eliza v2: npm i eliza-plugin-lemoncake
✅ MCP (Claude/Cursor/Cline): npx lemon-cake-mcp
✅ Dify Marketplace plugin (in review)
✅ 32 paid APIs in marketplace (search, scraping, LLM, data, image)
✅ USDC + JPYC on Polygon · sandbox mode for testing
✅ Auto idempotency keys · structured receipts on every charge
✅ Auto-journaled to QuickBooks, Xero, Zoho Books, freee
✅ KYA tier system (higher trust = higher daily limit)

5-min onboarding: lemoncake.xyz → top up $5 USDC (or sandbox) → copy Buyer JWT → .env → done.

👉 Two asks:

What paid APIs do you wish your agent could call? Drop them below — top-requested get added this month.
Eliza v2 builders hitting the "agent needs to pay" wall — DM me, I'll onboard you with sandbox credits.
GitHub: https://github.com/evidai/lemon-cake 🍋
